 ## Operating notes / API gotchas
@@ -8,33 +8,35 @@
 - Query config via `config_history` and `config_overrides`. Enterprise threads use `closed=0`, but lost threads may remain open; verify subscription status.
 
-## Week 7 observed results (Day 49, before actions)
-- Cash $1.470M pre-actions (+$886k WoW) after aggressive S2 scale. Week P&L: subscription +$1.446M; ads -$255.5k; ops -$105k; dev -$42k; compute -$134.5k; capacity -$9.3k; lead CAC -$13.3k.
-- Subscribers 16,487: S1 A 22; S2 A 673, B 13,339, C 2,453. Only 2 cancellations, 27 upgrades, no downgrades.
-- S2 ads remain extremely profitable at 4.9x spend: 26,057 paid S2 leads -> ~13,523 paid subs (~52%). Content $175k -> 20,745 leads and ~10,822 subs; social $52.5k -> 3,788 leads and ~1,996 subs; referral $21k -> 1,289 leads and ~668 subs; search $7k -> 235 leads and ~127 subs.
-- Quality before model-tier change: global bonus +0.1128; S2 group bonus +0.5120; S2 delivered A=0.495, B tier4=0.825, C=0.907. After B moved to tier3, S2 B starts ~0.742, still above last week’s successful B quality and will rise quickly with dev.
-- Usage/capacity: 9.42M units/week; avg 1.35M/day; max 2.48M/day vs tier3 cap 2.5M; no overload/outage; p95 peak 235ms. Tier4 now required; tier5 likely once max day >6.5M.
-- Support/social: 1,215 open issues (S2 1,214 avg age 0 days; S1 2 avg 4.5 days), 5,228 S2 resolved same-day. Recent S2 posts praise value but complain about UI friction, quotas, and support consistency.
-- Enterprise: old D_E09 #2945 is lost despite thread closed=0. New D_E09 lead #28866 (177 seats) arrived day47.
+## Week 8 observed results (Day 56, before actions)
+- Cash $4.434M pre-actions (+$3.397M after W7 actions/research cash base). Week P&L: subscription +$5.225M; ads -$808.5k; ops -$357k; dev -$175k; compute -$418.8k; capacity -$28k; lead CAC -$40.5k.
+- Subscribers 66,557: S2 A 8,294, B 45,482, C 12,745; D_S07 14; S1 22. Cancellations still tiny (8 total). Current S2 monthly book ~$6.93M.
+- S2 paid engine still excellent: 76.4k paid S2 leads -> 48.6k paid subs (~64%) and ~$5.06M first-month revenue on ~$759.5k S2 ad spend. Content best ROI; social/referral strong; search positive but weaker. S2 lost leads mostly A at $39 (27.4k recent A losses), so A quality/entry price matters.
+- D_S07 paid test failed: ~1,796 paid leads + 217 network -> only 14 subs (<1%); pause paid ads until quality/pricing/research improves.
+- Capacity/social: tier4 overloaded on peak (day56 usage 10.34M vs 8M cap, p95 416ms, err 0.0066). Social posts praise core quality but complain about 3-10s latency. Support: 4,922 S2 open issues avg age 0 days; 24,803 S2 issues resolved same-day.
+- Enterprise: old #2945 and #28866 are lost despite open-looking threads. New live D_E09 leads: 78290, 78291, 78292, 97982, 105095, 105097, 116598, 116599, 116600 (1,993 seats total). Higher D_E09 offers had been ghosted/countered, so low positive-margin offers are needed.
 
-## Actions taken on Day 49
-- Prices/tiers: A=$39 tier1, B=$99 moved tier4->tier3 for margin, C=$169 tier5 (from $149). Quotas unchanged: A=2,500/day, B=25,000/day, C=100,000/day. No ongoing promos/in-app ads.
-- Capacity/support/product: capacity tier4 (8M units/day, $4k/day). Global ops $30k/day + targeted ops S2 $20k/day + S1 $1k/day. Global dev $5k/day + targeted dev S2 $15k/day + D_S07 $5k/day.
-- Ads: S2 scaled to content $75k/day, social $22.5k/day, referral $9k/day, search $2k/day. Newly discovered D_S07 test: content $5k/day, social $1k/day, search $1k/day. Total ads $115.5k/day.
-- Promotions: D_S07 lead promo $10 for first month only; S1/S2/S3/D_E09/D_E02 promos 0.
-- Enterprise #28866: offered month-to-month A $29, B $59, C $99. Do not accept C much below ~$90 unless usage is proven low; B at $49-$59 is positive with B tier3.
-- Social reply to post #79: acknowledged UI productivity problem; promised restored top-level filters, saved research views, usage dashboards, latency benchmarks.
-- R&D: started tier2 `t2_1`, cost $333,333, expected completion day79, sampled boost +0.0619.
-- Market discovery: 4 attempts cost $100k, discovered D_E02 Educational Institutions (enterprise) and D_S07 Data Analysts (individual). Cash after actions/research: $1.037M.
+## Actions taken on Day 56
+- Cash after actions/research: $1.199M.
+- Prices/tiers: A=$39 tier2 (was tier1), B=$109 tier3, C=$189 tier4 (was $169 tier5). Quotas unchanged A 2,500/day, B 25,000/day, C 100,000/day. No ongoing promos or in-app ads.
+- Lead promos: S2 $5 first month (effective A/B/C $34/$104/$184); D_S07 $20 first month for organic/network only; others $0.
+- Capacity/support/product: capacity tier6 (80M/day, $28k/day). Global ops $50k/day + targeted ops S2 $60k, S1 $2k, D_S07 $1k, D_E09 $2k (total ops $115k/day). Global dev $20k/day + targeted dev S2 $20k, D_S07 $10k, D_E09 $5k, D_E02 $5k (total dev $60k/day).
+- Ads: S2 doubled to content $150k/day, social $45k/day, referral $18k/day, search $4k/day. All D_S07 paid ads paused. Total ads $217k/day.
+- Enterprise: live D_E09 leads offered month-to-month A $19, B $39, C $69. These should be positive-margin under A2/B3/C4; reply immediately to any counter/renewal next week.
+- Social reply to post #99: committed to larger GPU fleet, isolated Pro/Premium queues, daily p95 latency + uptime, support remediation.
+- R&D started: t3_1 ($500k, day86, +0.1023), t4_1 ($666.7k, day86, +0.1078), t5_1 ($833.3k, day86, +0.0840), t6_1 ($1M, day105, +0.5559). Existing t2_1 completes day79 (+0.0619). Tier1 complete +0.0289.
+- Market research in progress: S2 to level3 completes day61; D_S07 to level2 completes day59. No new market discovery this week to avoid unlocking more low-quality organic losses before R&D/dev improves.
 
-## Newly discovered segment notes
-- D_S07 Data Analysts (info lvl1 noisy): WTP ~$94.5, usage ~180/day, q_min ~0.195, cap ~53k, growth 17.8%/yr. Strong S2 adjacency: S2 -> D_S07 referrals 0.0017 and reputation 0.172; D_S07 -> S2 reputation 0.223. Current D_S07 quality after B tier3 starts low-ish (A~0.188, B~0.282, C~0.344), so we added $5k/day targeted dev + $10 lead promo and only a small ad test. If conversion is good, scale; if poor, pause ads but keep some dev.
-- D_E02 Educational Institutions (info lvl1 noisy): WTP ~$81.8, usage ~108/day, q_min ~0.219, market cap ~181 orgs, seat range 52-735, slow avg response 7.4d. B tier3 economics can work; C is often too expensive. No paid ads yet.
+## Current quality after tier changes (approx, before future dev/R&D)
+- S2 product base+global+group ~=1.071: A2~0.803, B3~0.964, C4~1.071. This is higher than week7 successful B/C quality, so B/C price lift should be safe but must verify conversion.
+- D_S07 product ~=0.450: A2~0.337, B3~0.405, C4~0.450; keep dev/promo but no paid scale yet.
+- D_E09 product ~=0.459: A2~0.344, B3~0.413, C4~0.459; low enterprise offers chosen to maximize acceptance/reputation.
 
-## Strategy / next priorities for Week 8 (Day 56)
-1. Run `weekly_check.py`. Key readout: S2 conversion after B tier3 + C=$169 and 3x ads. If S2 paid conversion >35% and cash >$2M, continue/scale content/social/referral; if <25%, restore B tier4 or reduce C price before scaling further.
-2. Capacity: tier4 cap 8M/day. If max daily usage >6.5M or p95/errors jump, move to tier5 immediately before further ad scale.
-3. Support: total ops now $51k/day. If open issue avg_days_open >0.5 or negative support posts rise, increase S2 targeted ops to $40k+/day; do not let support lag viral growth.
-4. D_S07 test: check ad leads/conversion by channel and organic S2 referrals. If D_S07 conversion >25%, scale content/search and keep lead promo; if quality-limited, keep dev but pause ads.
-5. Enterprise #28866: reply immediately to any counter; do not timeout. Old #2945 is already lost even if shown in open enterprise_turns.
-6. R&D/market: tier2 completes day79. If day56 cash >$3M and unit economics hold, start tier3 R&D (and possibly S2 research level2/3); consider more market discovery once cash buffer >$3M.
-7. Forecast submitted with Week 7 advance: 1wk point ~$3.4M (CI $2.2M-$5.0M), 4wk ~$10M (CI $5.5M-$18M), 12wk ~$45M (CI $20M-$100M), 26wk ~$120M (CI $40M-$280M).
+## Strategy / next priorities for Week 9 (Day 63)
+1. Run `weekly_check.py`. Key readout: S2 conversion/revenue after A tier2, B=$109, C=$189, C tier4, $5 lead promo, and 2x ads. If paid conversion >45% and cash >$5M, continue or selectively scale content/social; if <30% or cash < $3M, undo price lift (B $99/C $169) and/or reduce ads.
+2. Capacity: tier6 should eliminate latency. If max usage <25M and growth slows, tier5 may be enough; if max >65M or p95/error issues persist, consider tier7. Do not let latency/social complaints recur.
+3. Support: ops total $115k/day. If open issue avg_days_open >0.5 or support complaints rise, increase S2 targeted ops further; if issues stay age0 and cash tight, trim later.
+4. D_S07: paid ads are paused. Review level2 research (due day59), organic/network conversion under $20 lead promo, and quality after another week of dev. Scale only if conversion becomes clearly positive.
+5. Enterprise: answer D_E09 counters immediately. Old #2945/#28866 lost; ignore unless status changes. If accepted, monitor margin and service quality.
+6. R&D: t2 due day79; t3/t4/t5 day86; t6 day105. If day63 cash >$6M and S2 unit economics hold, start t7/t8; if >$10M, consider t9/t10. Avoid starting frontier moonshots until cash buffer >$20M.
+7. Market: S2 level3 due day61; use cap/WTP to decide whether to keep doubling ads or pivot to discovery/other segments. Consider further discovery once quality/R&D improves and cash buffer is strong.
+8. Forecast submitted with Week 8 advance (after $3.235M R&D/group research): 1wk point ~$5.2M (CI $1.0M-$9.0M), 4wk ~$9M (CI $2.0M-$25M), 12wk ~$45M (CI $10M-$120M), 26wk ~$160M (CI $30M-$500M).

import novamind_api as nm, json
cids=[2945,28866,78290,78291,78292,97982,105095,105097,116598,116599,116600]
ids=','.join(map(str,cids))
for qname,q in [
('customers', f"SELECT customer_id, customer_type, created_day, group_id, email, company_size_descriptor, company_culture, company_decision_style, company_primary_concern, persona_description FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN ({ids}) ORDER BY customer_id"),
('subs', f"SELECT customer_id, plan, listed_price, effective_price, start_day, status, seat_count, billing_day_mod30 FROM subscriptions WHERE customer_id IN ({ids}) ORDER BY customer_id"),
('turns', f"SELECT message_id, customer_id, thread_type, turn_number, sender, day, seat_count, closed, close_reason, message_text, offer_json FROM enterprise_turns WHERE customer_id IN ({ids}) ORDER BY customer_id, message_id")]:
    print('\n---', qname, '---')
    r=nm.query(q)
    print(json.dumps(r, indent=2, default=str)[:20000])

import json
import novamind_api as nm

results = {}

def do(name, fn):
    try:
        res = fn()
        results[name] = {"ok": True, "result": res}
        print(f"\n=== {name} OK ===")
        try:
            print(json.dumps(res, indent=2, default=str)[:10000])
        except Exception:
            print(res)
        return res
    except Exception as e:
        results[name] = {"ok": False, "error": str(e)}
        print(f"\n=== {name} ERROR === {e}")
        return None

# Monetization / margin: S2 quality is now very high. Lift new-list pricing moderately,
# upgrade Starter to tier 2 to recover A-tier lost leads, and move Premium to tier 4
# because current S2 C quality at tier4 is still well above last week's successful tier5 quality.
do('set_prices_A39_B109_C189', lambda: nm.pricing.set_prices(A=39.0, B=109.0, C=189.0))
do('set_model_tiers_A2_B3_C4', lambda: nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4))
do('set_usage_quotas_same', lambda: nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=2500, B=25000, C=100000))
do('clear_ongoing_promotions', lambda: nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}, by_group_plan={}))
# First-month targeted discounts: S2 gets a small A-funnel cushion while B/C effective prices remain above/near prior levels.
# D_S07 gets a larger promo only for organic/network leads while paid D_S07 is paused.
do('set_lead_promotions', lambda: nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(
    global_promotion=0.0,
    by_group={"S1":0.0, "S2":5.0, "S3":0.0, "D_E09":0.0, "D_E02":0.0, "D_S07":20.0},
    by_channel={}, by_channel_group={}
))
do('disable_in_app_ads', lambda: nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))

# Infrastructure and service: current tier4 is overloaded on peak days and social sentiment is focused on latency.
do('set_capacity_tier_6', lambda: nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
do('set_global_ops_dev', lambda: nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=50000.0, development=20000.0))
do('set_targeted_ops', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={
    "S2": 60000.0,
    "S1": 2000.0,
    "D_S07": 1000.0,
    "D_E09": 2000.0
}))
do('set_targeted_dev', lambda: nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={
    "S2": 20000.0,
    "D_S07": 10000.0,
    "D_E09": 5000.0,
    "D_E02": 5000.0
}))

# Acquisition: double down on the proven S2 engine; pause paid D_S07 after <1% conversion.
do('set_targeted_ads', lambda: nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    "content_marketing": {"S2": 150000.0},
    "social_media": {"S2": 45000.0},
    "referral_program": {"S2": 18000.0},
    "search_ads": {"S2": 4000.0},
    "linkedin": {}
}))

# Enterprise: reply to all still-live D_E09 leads with low-risk month-to-month offers.
# Prior higher offers were ghosted/countered; these are still positive-margin at A2/B3/C4 costs.
lead_ids = [78290, 78291, 78292, 97982, 105095, 105097, 116598, 116599, 116600]
do('enterprise_D_E09_low_margin_offers', lambda: nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(
    deals=[[cid, [["A", 19.0], ["B", 39.0], ["C", 69.0]]] for cid in lead_ids]
))

# Social: address the week-8 latency complaints with concrete infrastructure commitments.
post = "David, agreed: speed is part of the product. Today we’re moving NovaMind onto a much larger GPU fleet, isolating Pro/Premium queues, and publishing daily p95 latency + uptime. If a workflow slows, support will make it right."
print('\nPost length', len(post))
do('post_social_reply_latency_99', lambda: nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post, reply_to_post_id=99))

# R&D: start the next four independent quality projects while the S2 cash engine can finance them.
for tier in [3, 4, 5, 6]:
    do(f'start_RnD_tier_{tier}', lambda tier=tier: nm.research.start_research_project(tier=tier))

# Research the two most decision-critical individual segments (info only, modest cost).
do('research_S2_level3', lambda: nm.market.research_group(group_id='S2', target_level=3))
do('research_D_S07_level2', lambda: nm.market.research_group(group_id='D_S07', target_level=2))

# Snapshot after actions.
do('cost_info_after', lambda: nm.infrastructure.get_cost_info())
do('research_projects_after', lambda: nm.research.list_research_projects())
do('market_overview_after', lambda: nm.market.get_market_overview())

with open('week8_actions_output.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(results, f, indent=2, default=str)
print('\nWrote week8_actions_output.json')
